requirement_topic.en: NAWEC Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz and Project Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: NAWEC并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz及项目协调
requirement_topic.zht: NAWEC併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz及項目協調

summary.en: Gambia's public electricity supply is treated as a 230/400 V, 50 Hz system for EVSE design. NAWEC is the national electricity utility and any practical charger installation must be coordinated with NAWEC for service capacity, metering, protection, earthing, load management, and commissioning. PURA regulates electricity as a public utility and may affect licensing, tariff, and operator conditions. A public, EVSE-specific NAWEC grid code or charger-connection rule could not be confirmed from official public sources as of 2026-06-14.
summary.zh: 电动汽车充电桩设计应将冈比亚公共供电视为230/400 V、50 Hz系统。NAWEC是国家电力公用事业单位，任何实际充电桩安装均须与NAWEC协调服务容量、计量、保护、接地、负载管理和调试。PURA监管电力公用事业，并可能影响许可证、电价和运营商条件。截至2026年6月14日，未能从官方公开来源确认专门适用于EVSE的NAWEC并网规范或充电桩接入规则。
summary.zht: 電動汽車充電樁設計應將甘比亞公共供電視為230/400 V、50 Hz系統。NAWEC是國家電力公用事業單位，任何實際充電樁安裝均須與NAWEC協調服務容量、計量、保護、接地、負載管理和調試。PURA監管電力公用事業，並可能影響許可證、電價和運營商條件。截至2026年6月14日，未能從官方公開來源確認專門適用於EVSE的NAWEC併網規範或充電樁接入規則。

standards_or_laws: NAWEC electricity service and project-connection requirements — confirm project-specific conditions
PURA electricity-sector regulation and licensing requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China's domestic low-voltage baseline is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz, so export packages must confirm charger input range, protection settings, and thermal derating for Gambia's 230/400 V 50 Hz service and local grid constraints.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收文件。中国低压供电基线为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，因此出口资料包须确认充电桩输入范围、保护设定和热降额适用于冈比亚230/400 V、50 Hz供电及当地电网约束。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收文件。中國低壓供電基線為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，因此出口資料包須確認充電樁輸入範圍、保護設定和熱降額適用於甘比亞230/400 V、50 Hz供電及當地電網約束。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters should not assume a China 220/380 V charger is site-ready. Confirm the exact NAWEC supply point, available capacity, phase arrangement, short-circuit level, earthing system, metering, surge protection, harmonic limits, load curtailment, and commissioning requirements before shipment. Gambia's grid deficits and low electrification constraints make unmanaged high-power DC charging impractical outside engineered sites, donor projects, fleets, or captive-power installations.
gap.zh: 出口商不应假定中国220/380 V充电桩可直接用于现场。出货前应确认具体NAWEC供电点、可用容量、相制、短路容量、接地系统、计量、浪涌保护、谐波限值、负载削减和调试要求。冈比亚电网短板和电气化水平限制意味着，未经工程设计的大功率直流充电在工程站点、捐助方项目、车队或自备电源场景之外并不现实。
gap.zht: 出口商不應假定中國220/380 V充電樁可直接用於現場。出貨前應確認具體NAWEC供電點、可用容量、相制、短路容量、接地系統、計量、浪湧保護、諧波限值、負載削減和調試要求。甘比亞電網短板和電氣化水平限制意味著，未經工程設計的大功率直流充電在工程站點、捐助方項目、車隊或自備電源場景之外並不現實。

mandatory_status.target: Project gate — NAWEC connection coordination and PURA-regulated electricity conditions are necessary for grid-connected installations; an EVSE-specific public rule was not confirmed
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid acceptance is domestic evidence only and is not a NAWEC or PURA approval substitute

source.publisher: NAWEC — National Water and Electricity Company

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Gambia-ready charger package needs site-specific NAWEC coordination, 230/400 V 50 Hz rating confirmation, power-quality data, and a realistic load plan. China domestic 220/380 V acceptance files do not establish grid readiness in Gambia.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向冈比亚的充电桩资料包须包括具体站点的NAWEC协调、230/400 V 50 Hz额定确认、电能质量资料和现实的负载方案。中国国内220/380 V验收文件不能证明其已满足冈比亚并网条件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向甘比亞的充電樁資料包須包括具體站點的NAWEC協調、230/400 V 50 Hz額定確認、電能質量資料和現實的負載方案。中國國內220/380 V驗收文件不能證明其已滿足甘比亞併網條件。
